title: Bright Stars
description: Makes the stars in the game brighter.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b969daf7f4601805828a8099a3ebfecc8b74717.png)

**This mod uses the vanilla core shaders inside the resource pack and replaces the dim stars in the game with bright white ones.**

## **Difference:**
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/376a0ac2ed43b06569adaf1a5d6661ff9a0c3776.png)


<details>
<summary>P.S.</summary>

To be honest, the only thing I put any effort into was the resource pack's design. The resource pack itself is incredibly simple and boring. I feel like a fraud.

</details>
